response.title: Lead Retail Operations Manager
response.description: Retail Excellence Inc. is seeking a Lead Retail Operations Manager to oversee and optimize our retail operations across multiple locations. This role will be crucial in enhancing customer experience, driving sales, and ensuring operational efficiency. The ideal candidate will have a proven track record in retail management with strong leadership skills to guide a team of managers and associates. You will be responsible for implementing strategies that align with our business goals while fostering an environment of collaboration and accountability.

preferred_skills: Advanced Excel and Data Visualization Tools
requirements.education: Bachelor's Degree in Business Administration or related field
